Live Streams
3
rd
and Lindsley is partnered with Volume for all of your streaming and recording needs. Through our partnership, we are able to give artists and fans a whole new way to connect. Live streaming is quickly becoming a go-to method for artists to reach new fans and promote their music. With the addition of live streaming at 3
rd
and Lindsley via Volume, artists are provided with yet another avenue for promotion, discovery, and interaction. This addition also allows for artists to take home a high-definition recording of their performance for their own content usage, as the ownership of all content always remains with the artist.
